title: Verilator shows an internal error if a module that has inout ports is not inlined

features.name: module with inout ports marked no_inline_module
features.description: Code should include a module with inout ports that is marked with /*verilator no_inline_module*/ metacomment

features.name: inout port bidirectional signal assignment
features.description: Code should include an inout port assignment where the port drives either a value or high-impedance based on an enable signal
